title: Add an optimization pass safely
description: Introduce an IR optimization by proving its legality condition, gating it on that condition, and validating equivalence on a corpus.
body: Steps: 1. State what the pass does and the precise precondition under which it preserves semantics. 2. Implement the required data-flow analysis to detect when the precondition holds. 3. Apply the rewrite only when legal and re-establish IR invariants. 4. Run the IR verifier and differential tests (optimized vs unoptimized) across a program corpus, including edge cases. 5. Add regression tests for any miscompile found. Rollback point: keep the pass behind a flag until it is proven. Validation: differential testing shows identical observable behavior with the pass on vs off, and the IR verifier passes after it; a pass that improves a benchmark but changes one program's output must be reverted.
